meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.

globalAlerts.warning: ON TOOLS: Use `config.mk` to create custom targets to run with Make. ALWAYS use custom targets that *limit* the amount of output you receive. For example, piping through tail, with FEW lines output. Prior to tail, pipe to tee. The file ./build.log in the root of the project is gitignored, so use that. That way you can *search* the output. To be clear, timing dependent tests are BANNED. As are those that take too long to run. Testing retries, for example, MUST be done in a way that supports avoiding running afoul of those CRITICAL rules. Abide. OBEY.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Tasks are grouped to be executed in manageable units. Do not attempt to solve all tasks in a single turn. Break work into sessions as appropriate to prevent context window exhaustion.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Use subagents for execution of distinct task groups, and for the mandatory Rule of Two review gate. Serial only — no parallel subagent execution.

sequentialTasks.task: T200: Exec-safe shell quoting in osm:argv formatArgv
sequentialTasks.description: Fix the TODO at internal/builtin/argv/argv.go line 34. The formatArgv function currently joins arguments with spaces but does not handle special characters (spaces, quotes, backslashes, glob chars, semicolons, pipes, etc.). Implement proper POSIX shell quoting: single-quote arguments containing special characters, escape embedded single quotes with the '\'' idiom. Add unit tests in argv_test.go covering all edge cases. Verify existing fuzz tests pass. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T201: Rename osm:nextIntegerId to osm:nextIntegerID
sequentialTasks.description: Rename the native module osm:nextIntegerId to osm:nextIntegerID (Go naming convention). Keep osm:nextIntegerId as a deprecated alias. Update all references in docs, register.go, and tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T202: Migrate textarea runeWidth to uniseg grapheme clusters
sequentialTasks.description: In internal/builtin/bubbles/textarea/textarea.go, replace runewidth-based width calculation with github.com/rivo/uniseg grapheme cluster iteration (already in go.mod). Replace all runeWidth calls with uniseg equivalents. Add unit tests for emoji, combining characters, ZWJ sequences. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T203: MCP server removeFile and clearContext tools
sequentialTasks.description: Extend MCP server (internal/command/mcp.go) with two new tools: removeFile (removes file by path from context) and clearContext (removes all files/diffs/notes). Follow existing addFile/addDiff/addNote pattern. Update tool count in docs/tests (6->8). Add unit tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T204: osm:regexp module — Go RE2 regexp exposed to JS
sequentialTasks.description: Create osm:regexp native module in internal/builtin/regexp/. Functions: match, find, findAll, findSubmatch, findAllSubmatch, replace, replaceAll, split, compile (returns RegexpObject with same methods). Handle invalid patterns with JS Error. Register in register.go. Add unit tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T205: osm:encoding module — base64/hex encode/decode
sequentialTasks.description: Create osm:encoding native module in internal/builtin/encoding/. Functions: base64Encode, base64Decode, base64URLEncode, base64URLDecode, hexEncode, hexDecode. Handle decode errors with JS Error. Register in register.go. Add unit tests for round-trips, invalid input, empty strings. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T206: osm config reset subcommand
sequentialTasks.description: Add 'osm config reset' subcommand. Two modes: reset <key> (single key to default from schema) and reset --all (all keys). Add shell completion for key argument. Add confirmation prompt for --all (skip with --force). Register in command registry. Add unit tests. Update docs/reference/config.md. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T207: Test coverage for internal/storage/inspector.go
sequentialTasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for internal/storage/inspector.go. Cover all exported functions with positive/negative cases and edge cases. Use memory storage backend for isolation. Target 100% line coverage of inspector.go. Verify with go tool cover. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T208: Test coverage for internal/scripting/tui_commands.go
sequentialTasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for internal/scripting/tui_commands.go. Cover all command registration paths, execution with valid/invalid args, error handling. Use test helpers from internal/testutil/. Target 100% line coverage. Verify with go tool cover. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T209: Test coverage for internal/scripting/terminal.go
sequentialTasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for internal/scripting/terminal.go. Cover terminal state management, resize handling, input/output bridging, error conditions. Mock terminal I/O as needed. Target 100% line coverage. Verify with go tool cover. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T210: Test coverage for internal/scripting/js_context_api.go
sequentialTasks.description: Verified: already at 100% line coverage via existing integration and unit tests (runtime_test.go, context_txtar_test.go, integration_test.go). No new test file needed.

sequentialTasks.task: T211: Test coverage for internal/scripting/js_logging_api.go
sequentialTasks.description: Verified: already at 100% line coverage via session_terminal_coverage_gaps_test.go and runtime_test.go. No new test file needed.

sequentialTasks.task: T212: Test coverage for internal/scripting/js_output_api.go
sequentialTasks.description: Verified: already at 100% line coverage via runtime_test.go and unit_test.go. No new test file needed.

sequentialTasks.task: T213: Refactor testing hack in internal/scripting/unit_test.go:244
sequentialTasks.description: Refactored: global command handler now uses closure-captured state (state.set) instead of output.print hack. Added Go-side verification via GetStateForTest. Test passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T214: Add go-git/v6 dependency and implement wrapper utilities
sequentialTasks.description: Added go-git/v6. Created internal/gitops package with Clone, Open, AddAll, HasStagedChanges, Commit, Push, IsRepo. Simplified API (no auth layer — file:// repos only). 12 unit tests all pass. Wired into sync.go and sync_startup.go (done with T215).

sequentialTasks.task: T215: Replace git shell-outs in sync.go with go-git/v6
sequentialTasks.description: Replaced exec.Command calls in sync.go with gitops wrapper for: clone (executeInit, executePull fallback), add+commit+push (executePush), isGitRepo→gitops.IsRepo. Pull --rebase still uses exec.Command (go-git has no rebase). Updated coverage gap tests. All tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: T216: Replace git shell-outs in sync_startup.go with go-git/v6
sequentialTasks.description: No-op. The only exec.Command in sync_startup.go is 'git pull --rebase origin HEAD' in SyncAutoPull. go-git/v6 does not support rebase — same hybrid approach as sync.go. The isGitRepo→gitops.IsRepo replacement was already done in T215.

sequentialTasks.task: T217: Verify sync tests pass after go-git migration
sequentialTasks.description: Verified: All sync tests pass (init/push/pull). All 12 gitops tests pass. Full make passes (build, lint, deadcode, vet, staticcheck, all tests). Coverage: gitops.go 82.6%, sync.go functions 84-100%, sync_startup.go 52-100%. No regressions.

sequentialTasks.task: T218: Cross-platform integration testing of go-git sync
sequentialTasks.description: Verified: gitops and sync tests pass on macOS, Linux (Docker), and Windows (SSH). Pre-existing unrelated failures: TestWriteFile_ReadOnlyDir (Linux/Docker root), TestScanSessions_ReadDirError (Windows). No gitops regressions on any platform.

sequentialTasks.task: T219: Module resolution hardening for JS require()
sequentialTasks.description: Implemented module_hardening.go: validateModulePaths (startup validation with warnings), newHardenedSourceLoader (symlink escape detection), newHardenedPathResolver (../ traversal blocking for bare modules), circularDependencyTracker with cycle warning, installRequireCycleDetection (require wrapper). 15 new tests all pass. Full make passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T220: .prompt.md file discovery production hardening
sequentialTasks.description: Harden .prompt.md file discovery (prompt.file-paths config). Add: error reporting for missing/unreadable paths, edge case handling (symlinks, BOM, large files), glob pattern support, deduplication. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T221: Additional Anthropic prompt library goals
sequentialTasks.description: Research full Anthropic prompt library. Implement 3-5 new goals in goal_builtin.go following established pattern (stateVars, hotSnippets, flagDefs, promptOptions). Each needs: registration, metadata, prompt template, integration test. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T222: Configuration model schema versioning and migration
sequentialTasks.description: Add schema versioning to config model. Add config.schema-version field, migration framework for older versions, machine-readable defaults documentation, 'osm config validate' subcommand. Add tests for migration paths. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T223: Goal/script discovery production hardening
sequentialTasks.description: Harden autodiscovery: validate paths exist and are readable, handle permission errors gracefully, improve debug logging (timing, file counts, skip reasons), handle edge cases (empty dirs, symlink loops, large dirs). Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.description: Create detailed API docs for osm:unicodetext. Document every function with signature, params, returns, examples. Cross-reference from docs/scripting.md.

sequentialTasks.description: Create detailed API docs for osm:scrollbar. Document component model, config options, Bubble Tea integration, styling, examples. Cross-reference from docs/scripting.md.

sequentialTasks.task: T228: Detailed API docs for osm:regexp module
sequentialTasks.description: Create detailed API docs for osm:regexp (after T204). Document RE2 guarantees, every function, error handling, examples, comparison with JS RegExp. Cross-reference from docs/scripting.md.

sequentialTasks.task: T229: Detailed API docs for osm:encoding module
sequentialTasks.description: Create detailed API docs for osm:encoding (after T205). Document every function, standard vs URL-safe base64, error handling, examples. Cross-reference from docs/scripting.md.

sequentialTasks.task: T230: Update scripting.md with all new modules and changes
sequentialTasks.description: Comprehensive update of docs/scripting.md: add osm:regexp, osm:encoding entries, update osm:nextIntegerID rename, verify all existing module entries are accurate, fix broken cross-references.

sequentialTasks.task: T231: Review and update docs/architecture.md
sequentialTasks.description: Review docs/architecture.md against current codebase. Verify directory structure, component descriptions, data flow diagrams, all references. Update outdated sections. Add missing architectural components.

sequentialTasks.task: T232: Evaluate streaming fetch API approach
sequentialTasks.description: Re-evaluate streaming fetch requirement. Analyze actual use cases, pragmatic alternatives (chunked/callback vs full streaming), complexity cost. Write decision document in docs/archive/notes/. Decision task — implementation follows.

sequentialTasks.task: T233: Implement chunked/callback-based streaming in osm:fetch
sequentialTasks.description: Skipped per T232 decision. fetchStream() already exists with readLine()/readAll()/close(). No additional streaming API needed.

sequentialTasks.task: T234: Code review splitter workflow engine evaluation
sequentialTasks.description: Evaluate workflow engine approach for code review splitter LLM dependency. Analyze: lightweight BT engine, per-LLM templates, AI Orchestrator subsumption. Write findings in docs/archive/notes/. Decision task.

sequentialTasks.task: T235: Sync common config sub-feature
sequentialTasks.description: Implement shared config sync: common repo structure, intelligent conflict handling (prompt on unknown state, auto-override on known SHA), gitignored file handling, schema version mismatch handling. Add config keys. Extend sync.go. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T236: go-prompt enhancements investigation and implementation
sequentialTasks.description: Investigate and implement go-prompt improvements: better completion rendering, key binding customization, prompt styling, history management, multi-line input. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T237: MacOSUseSDK integration evaluation
sequentialTasks.description: Evaluate gRPC proxy approach for MacOSUseSDK integration. Assess useful capabilities, feasibility, platform implications. Write evaluation in docs/archive/notes/. Decision task.

sequentialTasks.task: T238: AI Orchestrator architectural design document
sequentialTasks.description: Create comprehensive design doc for AI Orchestrator. Present 3 approaches: minimal, clean architecture, pragmatic balance. Each with component diagram, data flow, API surface, testing strategy, trade-offs. Write to docs/architecture-ai-orchestrator.md. Gate for T239-T255.

sequentialTasks.task: T239: AI Orchestrator PTY spawning module
sequentialTasks.description: Implement PTY spawning module (osm:pty or extended osm:exec). Full PTY allocation via creack/pty, terminal state preservation, signal forwarding (SIGWINCH/SIGINT/SIGTERM), I/O bridging. Register as native module. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T240: AI Orchestrator MCP bidirectional communication
sequentialTasks.description: Extend MCP server for bidirectional Claude Code communication. Add tools: registerSession, reportProgress, reportResult, requestGuidance. Implement session identification, event queue. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T241: AI Orchestrator PTY output parsing
sequentialTasks.description: Implement PTY output parser: rate limit detection, permission prompt rejection (security-first), model selection menu navigation, SSO login flow detection. Configurable patterns. Add tests with captured output samples. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T242: AI Orchestrator configuration and env var management
sequentialTasks.description: Implement three-tier config: shared env inheritance, JS pre-spawn hooks (op plugin, aws-vault), profile-based env var profiles with CLI overrides. Add config keys. Handle provider-specific commands. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T243: AI Orchestrator provider abstraction (single instance)
sequentialTasks.description: Implement provider interface: Spawn, Send, Receive, Close. First implementation: single Claude Code instance via PTY. Design for extensibility (multiple providers, multi-instance). Add tests with mock provider. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T244: AI Orchestrator behavior tree orchestration engine
sequentialTasks.description: Implement BT orchestration engine leveraging PABT infrastructure. Prebuilt action templates: spawn-claude, send-prompt, wait-for-response, verify-output, split-branch, run-tests, commit-changes. Planning on failure with remediation. Internal only. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T245: AI Orchestrator PR splitting workflow
sequentialTasks.description: Implement PR splitting: linear branch series, each staged part is mergeable unit. Workflow: analyze diff, propose split, create branches, interleave AI for rebase, verify each split, equivalence verification. Use go-git (T214+). Integrate with BT engine. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T246: AI Orchestrator TUI multiplexing
sequentialTasks.description: Implement TUI multiplexing: meta-key switching (avoid tmux Ctrl-b conflict), terminal state save/restore, visual status bar, input routing, output rendering. Integrate with PTY module. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T247: AI Orchestrator TestMain integration testing
sequentialTasks.description: Implement TestMain for AI Orchestrator integration: CLI flags for provider config (-provider=ollama, -model=gpt-oss:20b-cloud), env vars for secrets, disabled by default (-test-integration), per-provider config. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm unit tests pass (integration skipped).

sequentialTasks.task: T248: AI Orchestrator error recovery and cancellation
sequentialTasks.description: Implement: crash detection/cleanup, hang timeout/force-kill, unexpected exit handling, progress reporting via MCP, user cancellation (Ctrl-C propagation, graceful shutdown), signal handling chain. Add tests for each failure mode. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T249: AI Orchestrator session isolation
sequentialTasks.description: Implement session isolation for multi-instance: unique session IDs, isolated state directories, independent MCP channels, resource cleanup, cross-session interference prevention. Session registry. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T250: AI Orchestrator building blocks for users
sequentialTasks.description: Expose orchestrator building blocks: osm:pty module, MCP helpers, BT templates, PTY parsing patterns, provider interface. Update scripts/ examples. Document in docs/scripting.md and docs/reference/. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T251: Claude Code Multiplexer — Ollama integration module
sequentialTasks.description: Create osm:ollama native module in internal/builtin/ollama/. API: listModels, chat, chatStream, isAvailable, getModel. Connect to configurable endpoint (default localhost:11434). Handle errors, timeouts, streaming. Add ollama.endpoint config key. Add tests with mock HTTP server. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T252: Claude Code Multiplexer — Claude Code wrapper/parser
sequentialTasks.description: Create osm:claude native module in internal/builtin/claude/. API: parseOutput (detect prompts/errors/rate limits/tool calls), createSession, sendPrompt, onResponse. Pattern matching for Claude Code output. Add tests with captured output samples. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T253: Claude Code Multiplexer — safety validation
sequentialTasks.description: Implement safety validation using osm:ollama. Categories: intent classification, scope assessment, risk scoring. Fail-closed on errors. Implement as scripts/claude-mux/validator.js. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T254: Claude Code Multiplexer — ideal choice resolution
sequentialTasks.description: Implement ideal choice resolution via Ollama. Multi-candidate analysis, criteria weighting, recommendation generation, user confirmation. Implement as scripts/claude-mux/resolver.js. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T255: Claude Code Multiplexer — main script
sequentialTasks.description: Create scripts/claude-mux.js orchestrating prompt detection, safety validation, choice resolution, Claude Code PTY spawning. Config via claude-mux.* keys. Fail-closed, audit logging. Add integration tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T256: Comprehensive security audit of scripting sandbox
sequentialTasks.description: Audit: Goja runtime initialization, module loading, require() path traversal, osm:exec command injection, osm:fetch SSRF, file system access, env var exposure. Review existing security_*_test.go files. Document findings, implement fixes, add regression tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T257: Performance benchmark review and optimization
sequentialTasks.description: Run benchmarks: 'go test -bench=. -benchmem ./...'. Analyze startup time, script execution, context building, memory usage. Identify bottlenecks, optimize. Add new benchmarks if needed. Compare before/after. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T258: Cross-platform verification — Linux
sequentialTasks.description: Run 'make make-all-in-container'. Fix Linux-specific failures: path handling, shell differences, terminal capabilities, signal handling. All tests must pass with zero failures.

sequentialTasks.task: T259: Cross-platform verification — Windows
sequentialTasks.description: Run 'make make-all-run-windows'. Fix Windows-specific failures: path separators, line endings, terminal API, signal handling (no SIGWINCH), file locking. All tests must pass.

sequentialTasks.task: T260: Full coverage report and gap analysis
sequentialTasks.description: Generate coverage: 'go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...' then analyze with go tool cover. For files below 80%: write tests or document reasons. Target all critical packages above 85%. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T261: Final documentation review
sequentialTasks.description: Review all docs: README.md, docs/README.md, scripting.md, configuration.md, architecture.md, reference/*.md, session.md, shell-completion.md. Fix broken links, outdated info, missing content. Ensure consistency.

sequentialTasks.task: T262: Error message consistency audit
sequentialTasks.description: Audit all error messages in internal/command/, internal/scripting/, internal/config/, cmd/osm/. Check: consistent formatting, user-facing clarity, sufficient debugging context, no raw Go errors exposed. Fix inconsistencies. Add tests for key error paths. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T263: Shell completion coverage audit
sequentialTasks.description: Audit all commands and subcommands for shell completion support. Verify: top-level completions, subcommand completions, flag value completions, dynamic completions. Add missing completions. Update docs/shell-completion.md. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T264: Session cleanup scheduler edge case testing
sequentialTasks.description: Test edge cases: cleanup during active session, cleanup with locked sessions, corrupted files, boundary conditions (MaxAgeDays/MaxCount/MaxSizeMB), concurrent invocations, permission errors, zero-size sessions. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T265: Config schema validation edge case testing
sequentialTasks.description: Test edge cases: empty config, unknown keys, wrong types, out-of-range values, special characters, very long values, duplicate keys, commented entries, encoding issues. Add tests. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T266: Fuzz testing audit and expansion
sequentialTasks.description: Audit existing fuzz tests (argv_fuzz_test.go). Add fuzz tests for: config parsing, goal JSON parsing, argument parsing, module path resolution, txtar generation. Run briefly with -fuzztime=30s. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T267: Integration tests for MCP server tools
sequentialTasks.description: Test full MCP stdio transport flow: start server, send JSON-RPC for each tool, verify responses, test error cases, concurrent requests, malformed input. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T268: Integration tests for session locking under concurrency
sequentialTasks.description: Test: simultaneous session opening, crash-while-holding-lock recovery, rapid lock/unlock, concurrent contention (10+ goroutines). Run with -race. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T270: Fix data race in storage path globals with cleanup scheduler
sequentialTasks.description: Fix data race in internal/storage/paths.go where SetTestPaths() modifies global state (pathsDataDir, pathsLockDir) while cleanup scheduler goroutine reads them via ScanSessions(). Root cause: tests call SetTestPaths() which modifies global variables while a separate test's cleanup scheduler is running. Solutions: (a) add mutex protection to path globals, (b) make paths instance-based rather than global, (c) ensure tests don't run concurrently. Recommended: add RWMutex to protect path globals with RLock for reads (SessionLockFilePath, ScanSessions) and Lock for writes (SetTestPaths, ResetPaths). Add proper synchronization or convert to test cleanup. Run tests with -race to verify. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T271: README.md quality review and enhancement
sequentialTasks.description: Improve README.md: installation instructions (binary/go install/source), quick start example, feature overview, usage examples, architecture link, contributing section. Ensure all examples work. Fix broken links.

continuousVerification.task: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: Execute after: (a) Each code change, (b) Each test addition, (c) Each task completion, (d) Each bug fix. Check build.log for failures.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY test fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix the issue before proceeding. Zero tolerance for test failures, timing issues, non-determinism, or race conditions.
continuousVerification.testCoverage: Target 100% effective test coverage. VERIFY with go tool cover before proceeding to next task.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: ON TOOLS: Use `config.mk` to create custom targets to run with Make. ALWAYS use custom targets that *limit* the amount of output you receive. For example, piping through tail, with FEW lines output. Prior to tail, pipe to tee. The file ./build.log in the root of the project is gitignored, so use that. That way you can *search* the output.
Timing dependent tests are BANNED. Tests that take too long are BANNED. Testing retries MUST avoid timing-dependent patterns. Abide. OBEY.
